title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search covers a broad range of emerging AI tools and techniques including 3D generation (Pixal3D), world models (Sana-WM), vision-language models (MiniCPM), video generation (Krea2), text-to-speech (DramaBox), and ChatGPT financial features. The video highlights 20+ products and research projects spanning generative media, embodied AI, and language model applications.
